2606.20700.title: Machine-Coached Policy Revision in Adaptive Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation: A Controller-Level Contestability Layer
2606.20700.paper_summary: Policy-oriented agent-based models are increasingly used to study regulatory interventions in complex adaptive socio-technical systems. Recent adaptive ABM frameworks distinguish between static and adaptive agents, fixed and adaptive policies, and alternative controller designs. However, most diagnostic workflows remain ex post: trajectories are analysed after simulation, but the resulting evidence is not systematically fed back into the policy controller. This paper proposes a lightweight machine-coached policy-revision layer for adaptive agent-based regulation. The layer represents policy decisions as defeasible rules with explicit conflicts and priorities, generates explanations for controller actions, and allows diagnostic failures to be translated into rule additions, removals, or priority changes. The contribution is not a new optimal controller and does not claim formal guarantees for unrestricted machine coaching. Instead, it provides a simulation-compatible operationalization of controller-level contestability: policy decisions can be explained, challenged, revised, and re-evaluated in held-out simulation runs. A stylized emissions-regulation ABM is used as the experimental component. A controlled simulation experiment focuses on an over-conservatism failure in the VPVA regime. The predefined coaching template adds a relaxation rule to the symbolic controller, reducing over-conservatism recurrence under held-out seeds while preserving violation, overshoot, and volatility guardrails. The paper argues that machine coaching is best understood as a controller-level extension of explainable adaptive ABM, complementary to causal, information-theoretic, and trajectory-based diagnostics.
2606.20700.paper_summary_zh: 政策導向的代理基模型越來越多地用於研究複雜適應性社會技術系統中的監管干預。<lb/>最近的適應性ABM框架區分了靜態和適應性代理、固定和適應性政策以及替代控制器設計。<lb/>然而，大多數診斷工作流程仍然是事後的：軌跡在模擬後進行分析，但產生的證據並未系統性地反饋到政策控制器中。<lb/>本文提出了一種輕量級的機器輔導政策修訂層，用於適應性代理基礎的監管。<lb/>該層將政策決策表示為具有明確衝突和優先級的可駁回規則，生成控制器行動的解釋，並允許將診斷失敗轉化為規則的添加、刪除或優先級變更。<lb/>這一貢獻不是一個新的最佳控制器，並且不聲稱對不受限制的機器輔導提供正式保證。<lb/>相反，它提供了一種與模擬兼容的控制器級可爭議性的操作化：政策決策可以在保留的模擬運行中進行解釋、挑戰、修訂和重新評估。<lb/>一個簡化的排放監管ABM被用作實驗組件。<lb/>一個受控的模擬實驗專注於VPVA體系中的過度保守失敗。<lb/>預定的輔導模板向符號控制器添加了一條放鬆規則，在保留的種子下減少過度保守的重現，同時保持違規、超出和波動的防護措施。<lb/>本文認為，機器輔導最好被理解為可解釋的適應性ABM的控制器級擴展，與因果、信息理論和基於軌跡的診斷互補。
2606.20700.author: Roberto Garrone et.al.
